description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a matte black receiver and a dark brown, vented barrel shroud. The barrel is relatively long and features a series of circular vent holes along the top, likely for heat dissipation. The shotgun is equipped with a prominent pump-action fore-end, textured for grip, and a pistol grip stock for enhanced control. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The detailing and finish suggest it is designed for durability and reliability in urban environments.
description: A tactical, pump-action shotgun with a vented barrel shroud, pistol grip, and matte black and brown finish. It features a robust build with a prominent pump and ergonomic stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening, vented barrel shroud, and the alignment of the pump and grip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, vent holes, pump-action fore-end, and pistol grip stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, the top of the barrel shroud, and the end of the pistol grip.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, pump-action fore-end, and the overall profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented shroud and extended length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
